positive: A mystical, symmetrical arrangement featuring a stylized crescent moon nestled within sprawling cosmic flora. The flora consists of intricate, glowing vines and geometric crystal leaves that curve gracefully to frame the central moon. Use a deep indigo and ethereal sapphire palette, contrasted with brilliant metallic gold accents emanating from the vines and crystals. The composition must be highly detailed and suitable for a repeating textile print, with strong, clean silhouettes against a slightly gradient dark background. Minimalist sci-fi fantasy aesthetic, perfect for apparel, high contrast, vector art feel, hyperdetailed.
negative: blur, low resolution, blurry, bad anatomy, watermark, signature, text, logo, ugly, poorly drawn, deformed, cropped, out of frame, extra limbs, noise, grain, jpeg artifacts
